title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Vishal Mega Mart - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!
